author: lOrm
content:
Deferred — owner-level architectural refactor (large surgery across src/memory.rs ~1337 lines).

**Fix outline:** Decompose MemoryDb into trait + concrete role-focused stores: ArchivalMemoryStore (save/search/get/update/delete/list/stats/clear), CoreMemoryStore (get/get_section/update/format), MemoryMigrator (ensure_schema_on, run_migrations_on, migrate_v*_on), with the SQLite connection injected. The current god-impl block (impl MemoryDb spanning 30+ methods) becomes a thin facade or is removed in favor of consumers holding Arc<dyn ArchivalMemoryStore> / Arc<dyn CoreMemoryStore> as needed.

**Partial progress already landed:**
- #728 (closed) replaced .unwrap() on conn.lock() with lock_or_poison across every method — eliminating the cascade-poison failure mode.

**Recommendation:** Architectural decisions of this scope (trait taxonomy, migration ownership, embedding-store boundary) are owner-level. Defer to a planned memory-subsystem revamp rather than ad-hoc agent work.
